source_gate_interpretation: STD-ACR-022-P requires exact match of device_group, site, release_condition, and timing. CAL-ACR-022 satisfies device_group DG-41B but fails site (18-L vs 18-P), use_class (lab vs production), and timing (lab calibration does not precede production activation). Source gate verdict ESCALATE is binding and deterministically determined.
